full_text:
Identification of lymphoid aggregates and TLS from H&E-slides

Hanna Elomaa 11.4.2025

H&E-stained whole tissue slides of ovarian cancers

Annotating all lymphoid aggregates (Lagg) and TLSs with germinal centers

Lagg and TLS counts
characteristics of tumors with Laggs+TLSs 
associations to the clinical parameters

Small number of TLSs, difficulties in differentiating them from Laggs

Clear TLS cases: large/clear round GC in the middle
